description_long: This bungalow features a prominent green hip roof with a large overhang, providing shade to the wraparound porch on the main structure. The exterior walls are primarily dark, contrasted by white railings, window shutters, and support columns. A staircase leads up to the porch, indicating a raised foundation, while the windows are rectangular and symmetrically placed on the visible facades. Adjacent to the main building is a smaller outbuilding with a matching roof style and color scheme, likely serving as a garage or storage shed. The property sits on a light-colored, flat base, simulating a paved or concrete lot. The overall design is simple yet functional, with clear separation between living and utility spaces.
description: A dark-walled bungalow with a green hip roof, wraparound porch, and adjacent matching outbuilding on a paved lot. Features include white railings, a raised foundation, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wraparound porch, staircase, and prominent green roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the porch extension, side windows, and the proximity of the outbuilding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, large windows, and the full width of the outbuilding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible window shutters, porch supports, and the roof's overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front and rear windows with side windows
